name: GUI Input Capture - Fake Credential Dialog via PowerShell
description: Detects fake credential dialog creation using PowerShell Get-Credential, CredentialRequest, PromptForCredential, or Windows CredUI API calls designed to phish user passwords.
query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe") and process.args : ("*Get-Credential*", "*CredentialRequest*", "*PromptForCredential*", "*CredUIPromptForCredentials*", "*credui.dll*")
